programs.title: Half Man
programs.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programs.title: House of the Dragon 2
programs.desc: The second series of the production, the events of which precede the action of "Game of Thrones".After the death of Lucerys Velaryon, the son of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen (Emma D'Arcy), which was caused by his cousin, Aemond Targaryen (Ewan Mitchell), Westeros finds itself on the brink of a bloody civil war.The Green Council supporting King Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney) and Queen Rhaenyra's Black Council are fighting for influence.Each side claims the Iron Throne.The dynamic development of events also affects the attitude of Rhaenyra's husband, Daemon (Matt Smith), in life.A man who spends a lot of time in Harrenhal Castle, away from his wife, changes a lot.In addition, the demons of his past begin to haunt him.

actor: King Aegon II Targaryen - Tom Glynn-Carney
Lord Corlys 'The Sea Snake' Velaryon - Steve Toussaint

programs.title: Bastarden
programs.desc: Year 1755, Denmark.The impoverished Captain Ludvig (Mads Mikkelsen) asks the king for permission to establish a colony on his behalf on the barren moors famous for their infertility.If successful, he expects to be awarded a knighthood and property.The aristocrats are outraged by his arrogance and assume defeat, but he receives consent.From then on, every day for Ludvig and his relatives is spent on hard, physical work beyond their strength, which will allow them to prepare the land for cultivation.They also hire people to help them - two runaway servants: Ann Barbara (Amanda Collin) and her husband.Months pass and the first buildings are built when the ruthless Frederik de Schinkel (Simon Bennebjerg), the land lord, tries to take over the moors.When Ludvig rejects his offer, he decides to destroy it.

programs.title: Man on Fire
programs.desc: American John Creasy (Denzel Washington) is a man haunted by nightmares from his past.He is a former assassin who worked for the CIA for many years.Frustrated, he avoids people and seeks solace in alcohol.Creasy comes to Mexico to visit his old friend and colleague, Rayburn (Christopher Walken).The city is currently gripped by a wave of kidnappings for ransom.Rich residents panic and many of them hire security guards to ensure the safety of their children.A friend finds John a job as a bodyguard for ten-year-old Pita Ramos (Dakota Fanning), the daughter of Mexican industrialist Samuel Ramos (Marc Anthony) and his American wife Lisa (Radha Mitchell).At first, Creasy has a hard time coping with the girl's presence.Over time, however, he becomes friends with her.Under its influence, he changes his attitude to life and gives up alcohol.Soon, however, little Pita is kidnapped.The desperate man does everything to save her.

programs.title: The Martian
programs.desc: A mission to the Red Planet is interrupted by a sandstorm.A team of astronauts evacuates to Earth, leaving one of the expedition members, Mark Watney (Matt Damon), on the surface of Mars, believing he is dead.After some time, the seriously injured astronaut regains consciousness.He realizes that his air and food supplies will soon be exhausted.He also cannot count on a rescue mission because he was presumed dead.Despite this, he tries to survive in difficult conditions and notify the inhabitants of Earth that he is alive and waiting for help.Ridley Scott's film is nominated for an Oscar in seven categories, including:as the best film and for the leading role of Matt Damon.Director Ridley Scott, the creator of such cult sci-fi films as "Blade Runner" and the Alien series, was a candidate for the Academy Award four times.

programs.title: A Royal Christmas Ballet
programs.desc: Former ballet dancer Carrie (Brittany Underwood) is to prepare a performance of "The Nutcracker" on the occasion of a visit from a foreign delegation.While working on the play, she becomes involved in an affair.
